prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating; Recurrent hypoglycemia symptoms with irregular meals (about once weekly).

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Repaglinide 1mg three times daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 99.9 kg; Height 178.9 cm; BMI 31.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/66 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.7%; 9 months ago 10.1%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.4%), FPG (12 months ago 258mg/dL; 9 months ago 288mg/dL; 6 months ago 270mg/dL; 3 months ago 259mg/dL; current 239mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 103.3kg; 9 months ago 98.2kg; 6 months ago 99.7kg; 3 months ago 97.3kg; current 99.9kg), Height (12 months ago 178.9cm; 9 months ago 178.9cm; 6 months ago 178.9cm; 3 months ago 178.9cm; current 178.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 31.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 67mmHg; 6 months ago 66mmHg; 3 months ago 65mmHg; current 66mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 108U/L; 9 months ago 99U/L; 6 months ago 107U/L; 3 months ago 100U/L; current 105U/L), AST (12 months ago 58U/L; 9 months ago 59U/L; 6 months ago 52U/L; 3 months ago 53U/L; current 56U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; current 39mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 186mg/g; 9 months ago 205mg/g; 6 months ago 174mg/g; 3 months ago 252mg/g; current 211mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 100mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 99mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 101mg/dL; 9 months ago 113mg/dL; 6 months ago 114mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 107mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
